calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-01-2016 Vacated

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Mediation
Off Calendar Jun-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Huster for petitioners Jane Robin Fujii and Richard Rees Jr.; Amanda Ebey for objector/beneficiary Eri Coker.

Mr. Huster informed the Court that the parties had attended mediation on last Thursday. Ms. Ebey stated that the parties had been unable to resolve their dispute, but were still talking. No future date was set by the Court. The parties confirmed that a trial date has been set. The Court reminded counsel that if they wished to continue the trial date, they needed to bring the appropriate motion in Department 206.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kevin Macksoud. (Not reported)

Petition 1. To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust; 2. For Financial Elder Abuse; 3. For Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Successor Trustee, 4.
Off Calendar Mar-23-2016 Continued To Jun-27-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Huster for (petitioner) Jane Fujii. Amanda Ebey for (objector) Ari Coker.

The Court asked counsel if there was any reason for this to still be on calendar. Mr. Huster stated that they need trial and mediation dates. Ms. Ebey stated that she agrees, that they were in deposition yesterday and that they may need to be sent to Department 206 as she has 5 witnesses. The matter was referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial on June 27, 2016. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than May 31, 2016. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by June 6, 2016. The matter was continued to and the Parties are to return on June 13, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
